summary: Frontend-only testing for RADAR V22 Gestão de Banca — validated REINICIAR TUDO reset bug fix and new horizontal 2-column layout. All 6 test scenarios PASSED.

tests_executed.name: T1 GANHEI increases banca + metas count
T2 PERDI decreases banca + increases stops count
tests_executed.details: 1x PERDI after 2x GANHEI: stops=1, banca=605→514.25 (15% of 605 = 90.75).

tests_executed.name: T3 REINICIAR TUDO resets state (metas=0, stops=0, banca=R$500,00, table=D1)
tests_executed.details: window.confirm auto-accepted; counters and table reset to initial state.

tests_executed.name: T4 REINICIAR TUDO persists across reload (no race condition)
tests_executed.details: localStorage immediately contains clean state {metas:0, stops:0, diaAtual:1, bancaAtual:500}; after full page reload values remain reset.

tests_executed.name: T5 Vertical layout — REINICIAR TUDO visible with red border
T6 Horizontal layout — 2-column (controls left ~40%, chart+table right ~60%)
tests_executed.details: gestao-tab root is flex-row with 2 children at 1920px viewport: left=765px, right=1139px. Ratio ≈ 40/60. REINICIAR TUDO visible with red border. Reset also works in horizontal layout.

critical_code_review_comments: GestaoTab.jsx zerarTudo (lines 123-152) correctly removes STORAGE_KEY then writes clean cleanData synchronously — eliminates the previous race with the auto-save useEffect. Good fix.

Auto-save useEffect (lines 46-59) writes on every state change; after zerarTudo setState batch, the effect will overwrite with identical clean data, so the explicit setItem on line 150 is defensive but harmless.

GestaoTab.jsx is 482 lines with heavy JSX duplication between horizontal and vertical branches (same inputs, banca display, buttons, chart, table). Recommend extracting ControlsPanel / ChartPanel / ProjectionTable sub-components to remove ~200 lines of duplication.

Horizontal layout left column uses fixed width:40% while right uses flex:1 — ratio verified as 40/60 at 1920px. On narrower viewports (<1024px) the 40% left column may be cramped for 3-column inputs; consider a min-width or switching breakpoint.
seed_data_creation: None — used in-session button clicks and REINICIAR TUDO between scenarios.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gestão de Banca: REINICIAR TUDO bug (race between setState and auto-save useEffect) fixed by writing clean state directly to localStorage inside zerarTudo (GestaoTab.jsx lines 123-152). Horizontal layout is 2-column flex (40% controls / 60% chart+table) when viewMode='horizontal' (lines 211-321); vertical is the original stacked layout (lines 324-479). Both layouts have data-testid=btn-reset with border-red-800 styling. viewMode is persisted in localStorage key 'viewMode' and toggled via [data-testid=view-mode-toggle] in Dashboard.jsx line 134.
